     the Fermi energy is    -0.4624 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.29272459 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          9.6E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08751557 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.20520903 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -237004.72818143 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  119600.40406231 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4202.93399877 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  109872.05681496 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.00390609 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.02 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.77 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  32 iterations
